name: Petrel Street Apartment Enhanced
description: After V's Confrontation with Gustavo Orta, the rest of his lil Gang of Valentinos decided to get outta town and that means his Apartment is up for grabs ! The Green Themed Lighting, Fully Decorated Apartment and Av Landing Pad will do V nicely, especially after having such a hard time with Gustavo.....Thanks for the parting Gift !
